items.title: England-Croatia referee was called Grade E by Tuchel
items.summary: Clement Turpin is appointed referee for England's opening World Cup game against Croatia on Wednesday - and was once labelled a "Grade E" official by head coach Thomas Tuchel.

items.title: Robinson ruled out of England's second Test against New Zealand
items.summary: Ollie Robinson has been ruled out of England's second Test against New Zealand due to soreness in his right knee.

items.title: 'I'll be staying out of the way' - Southgate on World Cup punditry
items.summary: Former England manager Sir Gareth Southgate says he turned down work as a pundit at the World Cup because he did not think it would be "helpful" to the side's chances.

items.title: Germany fire SEVEN past World Cup debutants Curacao
items.summary: Germany made a confident start to their World Cup campaign with a 7-1 win over tournament debutants Curacao in Group E.
